analog_report_caveat: Report-day assets show all standardized severe reports on the analog local calendar date. Matched reports are more specific and require a report to be within the configured radius and time window of the analog sample latitude, longitude, and valid time. A null analog or metadata-limited analog can have zero matched reports even if the broader calendar day had severe weather elsewhere.
experimental_caveat: Experimental analog guidance. Probabilities are nearest-analog label frequencies from a historical ERA5 gridpoint library and are not calibrated official NWS probabilistic guidance. Verify locally before use.
